existing_features.title: Restore the summary tab value computation logic to match v158 behaviour so that metric values (order counts, weight, quantity, CO orders) update correctly and reflect the appropriate subset of orders when switching between dashboard tabs (Total Orders, Ready, Hallmark, Customer Orders, Karigars).
Within each design group in the Total Orders tab, sort the rows from longest due (oldest order date) to least due (most recent order date), top to bottom, grouped by weight.
In the design group header row in the Total Orders tab, display the design code text in bold orange color.
Remove the image icon from the design group header row in the Total Orders tab.

new_feature_requests.summary: Fix summary tabs not changing values across tabs (restore v158 supply logic behaviour)
Fix RB partial supplied row not showing in Ready tab
Sort rows within each design group in Total Orders tab from longest due to least due, grouped by weight
Display design codes in design group header in bold orange color
Remove image icon from design group header in Totals tab

Fix the RB partial supplied row so it appears in the Ready tab after a partial supply action is performed. When an RB order is partially supplied, the supplied portion must be visible as a row in the Ready tab.
